texto: Focus on what you are and what you can rather than what others aren't & can't. You have to win
autor: they don't necessarily have to lose for you!
explicacao: Orientação direta de they don't necessarily have to lose for you! sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “Focus on what you are and what you can rather than what others aren't & can't. You have to win” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, alok-mishra, focus, útil em momentos de reflexao.
